'''Ghufran''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. He joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] after the death of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
